habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Sus mandíbulas amenazan crítico con una tirada natural de 19 o 20.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Powerful Jaws (Ex) The thylacine threatens a critical hit on a natural roll of 19 or 20.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1/2
Thylacine

AC 13, touch 13, flat-footed 11 (+2 Dex, +1 size)

Speed 30 ft.
Melee bite +2 (1d4+1/19-20)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Abilities Powerful Jaws (Ex) The thylacine threatens a critical hit on a natural roll of 19 or 20.

Statistics Str 12, Dex 15, Con 16, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 7
CMD 12

Skills Perception +8
